title: Kotlas Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kotlas, with a Z-Score of +3.29. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kotlas are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 39%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 3.1 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has resulted in 0.0 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
